projects.recommendation: Accelerate the remaining 25 source system pipelines; current velocity is sufficient to meet the deadline.

projects.recommendation: Proceed to closed beta; product quality meets the threshold for controlled testing.
projects.decision: PILOT APPROVED - Phase 3 milestones met. Pilot approved for a 3-month internal beta with 50 users. Full rollout contingent on pilot KPIs being met within 12 weeks. Budget of $95,000 released for pilot phase.
